title: Extra Inputs
description: Adds some more detectable inputs for mapmaking.
body: Join our Discord Server: For information, help, bug reports and anything else related to the project, join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/P4dUsxv6An)! About: Extra Inputs is a small mod which adds 6 new keybinds for players to use, as well as universal attack, use and pick block detection. These inputs can be detected as scoreboard objectives and will not do anything on their own. Interested in hosting a server for any of my mods? Be sure to go with Bloom Host [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10). [](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10) Buying a server using this link supports me directly!
